greeting.line: You wear no banner? I wear ours. Same face, different flag. Strange, isn't it.
greeting.line_friendly: Same face, my flag. Walk under it a while.
greeting.line_hostile: Factionless mirror — I have nothing for you.

lore.line: I believed in something and it gave me an army. You stayed free and it gave you nothing to hold. Which of us do you pity? Careful — I'm asking myself the same thing.
